completedStories.notes: LogSessionSheet: ConsumerStatefulWidget with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin; duration chips (15/25/45/60 + Autre); custom chip reveals inline TextField (autofocus, numeric); started_at editable via showTimePicker; notes optional TextFormField; save button disabled until duration > 0; completion animation via flutter_animate + AnimationController (fadeOut+scaleXY durationSlow) then Navigator.pop(). PracticeNotifier.logSession(): queries agendaRepositoryProvider.getEventsBetween() to compute isAnchored (overlapping 'practice' category event); creates Session, calls repo.addSession(), invalidateSelf() on success. skillByIdProvider (Provider.family<Skill?, int>) for sheet to look up skill name. Router updated: log-session/:id → LogSessionSheet(skillId: int.parse(id)). 6 widget tests (save disabled, chip enables, save calls addSession correctly, custom 90min, skill name shown, custom 0 stays disabled). 215/215 total pass, analyze clean.

SkillWithStats entity (Skill + int currentStreak + Session? lastSession + List<bool> activityLast7Days). StreakCalculator stub (returns 0 — full impl in 3.5). PracticeNotifier changed from AsyncNotifier<void> to AsyncNotifier<List<SkillWithStats>>: build() watches allSkillsProvider.future, for each skill fetches getSessionsForSkill(since=6daysAgo) + getLastSession, computes 7-day activity via _sameDay helper, calls StreakCalculator.compute. addSkill/updateSkill/deleteSkill now invalidateSelf() on success. SkillCard widget: GestureDetector (onTap→go skill detail, onLongPress→go log-session), Container with surfaceContainerHighest+outline+radiusLg, top row name+streak badge (only shown when >0), _ActivityBar (Row of 7 AnimatedContainers), bottom row last session text (Aucune session / today→aujourd'hui / 1→hier / N→il y a N jours). PracticePage updated to watch practiceNotifierProvider instead of allSkillsProvider; _SkillList now shows SkillCard. 8 new widget tests. 209/209 total pass, analyze clean.

SkillTypeDetector (abstract final class, static detect() with 5 keyword lists, defaults to personal; NO short substrings 'ai'/'ia' to avoid false positives in e.g. 'japonais'/'piano'). PracticeNotifier (AsyncNotifier<void> with addSkill/updateSkill/deleteSkill delegating to repo). PracticePage (ConsumerStatefulWidget, _hasShownFirstLaunch guard, initState postFrameCallback check + ref.listen for async data; shows FirstLaunchSheet via showModalBottomSheet when skills empty on load). FirstLaunchSheet (ConsumerStatefulWidget, TextEditingController, auto-detects SkillType via SkillTypeDetector, Navigator.of(context).pop() — NOT go_router context.pop() to allow test without GoRouter). Router updated: practice route → PracticePage, add-skill → FirstLaunchSheet. 19 tests (13 unit + 6 widget), 201/201 total tests pass, analyze clean.

SkillType enum (6 values, .value = name), Skill entity (@immutable, validate() → Result<Skill>, copyWith), Session entity (@immutable, copyWith). Skills table +7 columns (type/metric_config/level_label/level_updated_at/sessions_since_level_update/is_archived/suppressed_until). Sessions table +5 columns (mode_tags JSON/performance_metric/feel_score/is_milestone/milestone_label). Suggestions table +category. schemaVersion 1→2 with onUpgrade m.addColumn for all 13 new columns. PracticeDao (@DriftAccessor, 9 methods including insertSessionAtomic for transactional insert+counter update via customUpdate). SkillMapper (fromRow throws ArgumentError on unknown type, toCompanion with Value(nullable)). SessionMapper (fromRow deserializes JSON mode_tags, handles null→[], malformed→[]; toCompanion jsonEncode). PracticeRepositoryImpl (all writes try/catch → databaseWriteFailed, addSession uses insertSessionAtomic). AppError +validationFailed (9 variants total). 29 tests pass (TS-037 to TS-057). Key: inserted_session_atomic pattern in DAO to avoid exposing db.transaction() outside the accessor.

Event entity (pure Dart, immutable, validate() returns Result<Event>), EventCategory enum (personal/work/practice), AgendaRepository abstract interface, AgendaDao (@DriftAccessor on Events table, 6 DAO methods, UTC epoch ms storage, watchEventsForDay with day-boundary query), EventMapper (fromRow/toCompanion with ArgumentError on unknown category), AgendaRepositoryImpl (try/catch wrapping all DAO calls → AppError.databaseWriteFailed). AppDatabase.agendaDao added. 12 tests pass (TS-001 to TS-012) using in-memory NativeDatabase with PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON.

AgendaStripState sealed class (EventsToday, NextTomorrow, NothingScheduled). agendaStripProvider: async* StreamProvider watching today's events, computing upcoming (≤2 sorted), falling back to tomorrow query, falling back to NothingScheduled. try/catch yields NothingScheduled on any stream error (Riverpod 3.x doesn't propagate stream errors as AsyncError). AgendaStrip ConsumerWidget with 3-state rendering, 20-char truncation, loading skeleton Container. 7 tests pass (TS-013 to TS-019). Key discovery: Riverpod 3.x StreamProvider converts stream errors to AsyncLoading (not AsyncError) — error handling must be inside the async* body.

AgendaPage with day-header date display, swipe navigation (left/right GestureDetector calling notifier.setDay()), FAB opening AddEventSheet. DayTimeline StatefulWidget: 34 hour-slots (6am–11pm, 32dp each, total 1088dp), ScrollController auto-scrolling to current hour on init, Stack with EventBlock/FreeSlotBlock/CurrentTimeIndicator Positioned widgets. EventBlock: 4dp left border colored by category, min-height 32dp, Ink tap to event detail. FreeSlotBlock: dashed border, muted tint, tap opens AddEventSheet with prefillStartTime. CurrentTimeIndicator: Timer.periodic 1-minute refresh, accent dot+line. selectedDayProvider (NotifierProvider with setDay method), dayEventsProvider (StreamProvider). Tests: TS-020 to TS-030 covered by DAO and integration tests.

AddEventSheet ConsumerStatefulWidget: title/time/category/notes form, RadioGroup<EventCategory> (Flutter 3.41.9 API replacing deprecated RadioListTile.groupValue), prefillEvent and prefillStartTime optional params, endAfterStart() validation, context.canPop() guard before pop (fixes GoError in single-route tests). EventDetailPage: FutureProvider.family loading, delete with undo snackbar (5s ScaffoldMessenger), re-insert via copyWith(clearId:true) on undo. AgendaNotifier (AsyncNotifier): addEvent/updateEvent/deleteEvent with notification scheduling/cancelling. 5 tests pass (TS-031 to TS-036). Key fix: RadioGroup<T> wrapping RadioListTile<T> values required for Flutter 3.32+.

CalendarPage with TableCalendar<Event>: month format, event dot markers (max 3, work>practice>personal priority), custom markerBuilder, day-tap navigates to /home/agenda with selected day/time. focusedDayProvider (NotifierProvider), monthEventsProvider (FutureProvider.family<Map<DateTime, List<Event>>, DateTime>) grouping events by stripped date. Pattern matching for AsyncValue: switch(monthEventsAsync) { AsyncData(:final value) => value, _ => <DateTime, List<Event>>{} } — required because AsyncValue.valueOrNull removed in Riverpod 3.x. CalendarStyle uses Material3 colorScheme tokens. Tests covered via integration (events appear as markers when inserted).

All 19 required runtime deps added, pubspec name changed to odo, Android permissions configured (7), iOS Info.plist configured, CONVENTIONS.md expanded with naming+zero-lint sections, folder structure created, main.dart initialization order correct.

Two-file split: odo_theme.dart (OdoTheme immutable data class, withCustomAccent method) + app_colors.dart (8 raw palette constants @visibleForTesting, 3 fixed category tokens, 3 agenda semantic aliases, 7 const OdoTheme presets, allThemes list). orbIdle = accent @ 0x4D alpha (30%). 41 tests, 100% pass. flutter analyze clean.

GoRouter with initialLocation=/glance, ShellRoute wrapping /home tabs with 5-tab NavigationBar (Accueil/Agenda/Pratique/Insights/Profil in French), all 10 top-level routes + 4 bottom-sheet routes (slide-up CustomTransitionPage), PlaceholderScreen, CONVENTIONS.md updated with Import Rules + Navigation sections. 129/129 tests pass.

sealed Result<T> with Success/Failure, .when()/.getOrNull()/.isSuccess/.isFailure. AppError enum (8 variants) in lib/core/domain/app_error.dart. Migrated AppFailure → AppError across all AI providers and tests. 11 tests pass.

ConnectivityService (connectivity_plus Stream<bool>), NotificationService (flutter_local_notifications, Africa/Abidjan TZ, event reminders), BackgroundTaskService (workmanager, top-level callbackDispatcher, evening_check periodic task), VoiceService (idle/listening/parsing/committing/committed state machine, sync broadcast stream), LocaleService (formatXof thin-space, formatDate, formatTime), service_providers.dart. 16 tests pass.

AiProvider abstract + ChatMessage/AiContextPayload/AiResponse value types. ClaudeAiProvider uses http.Client injection, targets claude-sonnet-4-6, AI_API_KEY from dart-define. Stubs: Gemini/Groq/OpenAI return aiUnavailable. OfflineStub returns canned text. aiProviderServiceProvider switches on kActiveAiProvider. 6 tests pass.

6 Drift tables (Skills, Sessions, Events, Suggestions, EveningSessions, EveningHighlights), PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON, 5 performance indexes, @DataClassName row types, AppDatabase.forTesting constructor, appDatabaseProvider Riverpod singleton. 8/8 tests pass including cascade delete verification.

AppSpacing (sp2-sp32 + radius scale), AppDurations (fast/default/slow), AppTypography (Fraunces + DM Sans, 7 getters), AppTheme.fromOdoTheme (Material3 ThemeData from OdoTheme), sharedPreferencesProvider (keepAlive), ActiveTheme Riverpod Notifier (persists to SharedPreferences). 88/88 tests pass. google_fonts async errors in tests isolated using runZonedGuarded pattern.

notes: Story files created 2026-05-13. 41 stories across 6 epics derived from epics.md. All story artifacts in _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/. Sprint plan in _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/sprint-plan-2026-05-13.md.
